Localization.Description: An object is created, configured, or imported

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The user {subject.account.name} configured protected application {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to create traffic profile "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to import private SSL key {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} configured listening IP address {object.value} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} configured node {object.value} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created rule "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to configure protected application {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} imported private SSL key {object.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to configure node {object.value} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created object "{object.name}" of the "{object.type}" type in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to configure listening IP address {object.value} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to create the account {object.account.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to create object "{object.name}" of the "{object.type}" type in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created report "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created the account {object.account.name} in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to create rule "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} failed to create report "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
The user {subject.account.name} created traffic profile "{object.name}" in PT Application Firewall on host {event_src.host}
